nodes.name: Buff-throated warbling finch
nodes.summary: Buff-throated warbling finch（Microspingus lateralis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Buff-throated warbling finch。

nodes.name: Buff-throated warbling finch
nodes.summary: The buff-throated warbling finch (Microspingus lateralis) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in forest borders and woodland in south-eastern Brazil. It was previously considered conspecific with the gray-throated warbling finch, and together they were known as the red-rumped warbling finch. The SACC found enough evidence to split them in 2009. References

nodes.summary: Microspingus（Microspingus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如Plain-tailed warbling finch、Rusty-browed warbling finch、Buff-throated warbling finch等8种鸟类。
